title: AWS Lambda with Amazon ElastiCache Serverless (Valkey)
description: Deploy a Lambda function connected to ElastiCache Serverless with Valkey engine for sub-millisecond caching.

introBox.headline: How it works
text: Lambda connects to ElastiCache Serverless running the Valkey engine to perform key-value operations with sub-millisecond latency.
Invoke the function URL with set/get/del operations
